title: S&P 500 Stock Market Winners Today
text: Oil stocks were S&P 500 winners Monday, including Diamondback Energy. Bristol Myers Squibb was among the big losers.

title: Why APA, Centennial Resource Development, and Obsidian Energy Were Rising by Double Digits This Week
text: The oil and gas sector surged following comments by Saudi Arabia, Russia limiting gas supplies to Europe, and China's stimulus measures.

title: APA Corporation Announces First Discovery in Block 53 Offshore Suriname; Provides Update on Block 58 Operations
text: HOUSTON, Aug. 23, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA) today announced an oil discovery offshore Suriname at Baja-1 in Block 53 and provided an update on recent drilling operations at Dikkop-1 in Block 58.

title: APA Meets on Q2 Earnings, Buys Assets, Lowers Output View
text: APA Corporation (APA) bought back 7 million shares at $41.59 apiece during the second quarter. The company also spent $43 million in the form of dividend payment.

title: APA Corporation's Blowout Earnings And Low Price Spell Opportunity
text: APA Corporation had incredibly strong 2Q 2022 earnings, although the company has redirected its focus to debt paydown over share buybacks. The company has a modest but sustainable dividend and is focused on buybacks and dividends, something we agree with.

title: APA Corp (APA) CEO John Christmann on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: APA Corp (NASDAQ:APA ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call August 4, 2022 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Gary Clark - VP, IR John Christmann - CEO, President & Director Stephen Riney - EVP & CFO David Pursell - EVP, Development Conference Call Participants Doug Leggate - Bank of America Merrill Lynch John Freeman - Raymond James & Associates Jeanine Wai - Barclays Bank Leo Mariani - MKM Partners Robert Brackett - Sanford C. Bernstein & Co. Neal Dingmann - Truist Securities Neil Mehta - Goldman Sachs Group Operator Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for standing by, and welcome to the APA Corporation's Second Quarter 2021 Results Conference Call.

title: APA (APA) Q2 Earnings Match Estimates
text: APA (APA) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0% and 9.86%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Oil producer APA's second-quarter profit nearly triples
text: (Reuters) -U.S. oil producer APA Corp reported a second-quarter profit that nearly tripled on Wednesday, bolstered by surging crude prices.

title: APA Corporation Announces Second-Quarter 2022 Financial and Operational Results
text: HOUSTON, Aug. 03, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA) today announced second-quarter 2022 financial and operational results. Results can be found on the company's website by visiting www.apacorp.com or investor.apacorp.com.

title: Shale Oil Stocks Drop Ahead Of Quarterly Earnings
text: Shale oil producers will be reporting quarterly results this week, coming on the heels of energy giants Exxon Mobil, Chevron and Shell all posting record profits.

title: 7 Oversold Energy Stocks to Buy Now
text: With energy prices down from their multi-year highs, bullishness for stocks in the space has cooled recently. Shares that spiked in tandem with soaring crude oil and natural gas prices have pulled back.
